016package org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
020import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionInput;
021import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionOutPoint;
022import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionOutput;
023import org.bitcoinj.script.Script;
024import org.bitcoinj.script.ScriptBuilder;
025
026/**
027 * Immutable data for a transaction input.
028 * See also {@link RawTransactionSigningRequest.RawInput} which can hold an incomplete transaction input, like
029 * those sent in the {@code signtransactionwithwallet} JSON-RPC request.
030 */
031public interface TransactionInputData {
032    Coin amount();
033
034    /**
035     * prevOut ScriptPubKey
036     */
037    Script script();
038
039    /**
040     * This probably shouldn't be here but is needed for proper operation with bitcoinj
041     * @return A Transaction "outpoint" pointing to the utxo this input will spend.
042     */
043    TransactionOutPoint toOutPoint();
044
045    Utxo toUtxo();
046
047    /**
048     * Create from a UTXO that paid to an address the intended signer can redeem
049     */
050    static TransactionInputData of(Utxo.Signable utxo, Address address) {
051        return new TransactionInputDataUtxo(utxo.txId(), utxo.index(), utxo.amount(), ScriptBuilder.createOutputScript(address));
052    }
053
054    /**
055     * Create from a UTXO that paid to a script the intended signer can redeem
056     * @param utxo Complete UTXO info
057     * @return input ready for signing
058     */
059    static TransactionInputData of(Utxo.Complete utxo) {
060        return new TransactionInputDataUtxo(utxo.txId(), utxo.index(), utxo.amount(), utxo.scriptPubKey());
061    }
062
063    /**
064     * Create an unsigned transaction input from an unspent transaction output that the signer can redeem
065     * @param out An unspent transaction output
066     * @return transaction input data
067     */
068    static TransactionInputData fromTxOut(TransactionOutput out) {
069        return new TransactionInputDataUtxo(out.getParentTransactionHash(), out.getIndex(), out.getValue(), out.getScriptPubKey());
070    }
071
072    /**
073     * Create an unsigned transaction input from a bitcoinj (unsigned) TransactionInput.
074     * @param input A transaction input (typically/currently unsigned)
075     * @return transaction input data
076     */
077    static TransactionInputData fromTxInput(TransactionInput input) {
078        return new TransactionInputDataUtxo(
079                input.getOutpoint().hash(),
080                (int) input.getOutpoint().index(),
081                input.getValue(),
082                input.getScriptSig());
083    }
084}
